---
id: post-channels-channel-id-detection-disable
title: 'Post /channels/{channelId}/detection/disable'
description: 'Disable automatic ad-break detection for a channel. Stops the per-channel detection scheduler.'
sidebar_label: 'Post /channels/{channelId}/detection/disable'
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: 'post api-method'
info_path: ads/api/reference/optiview-ads-api
custom_edit_url: null
hide_send_button: true
---

import MethodEndpoint from '@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint';
import ParamsDetails from '@theme/ParamsDetails';
import RequestSchema from '@theme/RequestSchema';
import StatusCodes from '@theme/StatusCodes';
import OperationTabs from '@theme/OperationTabs';
import TabItem from '@theme/TabItem';
import Heading from '@theme/Heading';
import Translate from '@docusaurus/Translate';

<Heading as={'h1'} className={'openapi__heading'} children={'Post /channels/{channelId}/detection/disable'}></Heading>

<MethodEndpoint method={'post'} path={'/api/v1/channels/{channelId}/detection/disable'} context={'endpoint'}></MethodEndpoint>

Disable automatic ad-break detection for a channel. Stops the per-channel detection scheduler.

<Heading id={'request'} as={'h2'} className={'openapi-tabs__heading'}>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{ description: 'Identifier of the channel.', in: 'path', name: 'channelId', required: true, schema: { type: 'string' } }]}
></ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema title={'Body'}></RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  responses={{
    '200': {
      content: {
        'application/json': {
          schema: {
            additionalProperties: false,
            properties: {
              adPrefetchMs: {
                description:
                  'Ad prefetch window in milliseconds, controlling how far ahead of a break start time the break is delivered to the player. Defaults to 10000 (10 seconds) when not set.',
                exclusiveMinimum: true,
                maximum: 9007199254740991,
                type: 'integer',
              },
              createdAt: { description: 'Timestamp when the channel was created, as an ISO 8601 datetime string.', type: 'string' },
              customAssetKey: {
                description: 'Google DAI custom asset key used for the server-guided (SGAI) path. Required for vendor pod breaks.',
                type: 'string',
              },
              detectionEnabled: {
                description:
                  'Whether automatic break detection runs for this channel. Read-only on create and update; toggle it via the detection enable/disable endpoints. Defaults to false.',
                type: 'boolean',
              },
              dvrWindowMs: {
                description:
                  'DVR (rewind) window in milliseconds, controlling how far back the platform looks for breaks to deliver to players. Defaults to 300000 (5 minutes) when not set.',
                exclusiveMinimum: true,
                maximum: 9007199254740991,
                type: 'integer',
              },
              id: { description: 'Unique channel identifier.', type: 'string' },
              liveOffsetMs: {
                description:
                  'Live latency offset in milliseconds: how far the player live playhead trails real time on this channel. Break start times are evaluated against now minus this offset. Defaults to 0 (no offset).',
                maximum: 9007199254740991,
                minimum: 0,
                type: 'integer',
              },
              name: { description: 'Human-readable display name for the channel.', type: 'string' },
              pollingActiveSeconds: {
                description: 'Break manifest polling interval in seconds advertised to players during an active break. Defaults to 1 when not set.',
                exclusiveMinimum: true,
                maximum: 9007199254740991,
                type: 'integer',
              },
              pollingIdleSeconds: {
                description: 'Break manifest polling interval in seconds advertised to players when no break is active. Defaults to 10 when not set.',
                exclusiveMinimum: true,
                maximum: 9007199254740991,
                type: 'integer',
              },
              timebase: {
                description:
                  'Time reference used for scheduling breaks on a channel: `wallclock` (ISO 8601 datetime) or `pts` (numeric presentation timestamp).',
                enum: ['wallclock', 'pts'],
                type: 'string',
              },
            },
            required: ['id', 'timebase', 'detectionEnabled', 'createdAt'],
            type: 'object',
          },
        },
      },
      description: 'Default Response',
    },
  }}
></StatusCodes>
